svg.text: A Claude Code plugin — how 13 hooks wire into your session
FOLLOW THE ARROWS · TOP TO BOTTOM
Your context survives across sessions, automatically.
you resume with full context — no re-explaining
You only edit what you declared. Drift gets caught before it ships.
if the file isn't in scope
add it to scope.md → edit proceeds
audit the diff hunk-by-hunk, drop unrelated drift
“Done” has to match the plan. The final sign-off stays yours.
the live checklist every guard reads
only you may flip it — never the agent
Lightweight reminders — they never block, just keep you sharp.
verify claims · push back · find the real cause
never “I can't” — probe, install, then use it
name a secret, never echo its value
git mv of an edited file stages the OLD blob
